_comment: Signals run by scorecard_gate.py --verify to DERIVE coherence (override the self-asserted field). coherence=PASS iff all required signals exit 0. Tune freely.

signals._comment: Anti-CVT: every modified file must resolve to tracked git symbols; no invented paths or untracked dependencies.
signals.name: no-invented-symbols
cmd: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from scripts.gates.scorecard_gate import run_no_invented_symbols; sys.exit(0 if run_no_invented_symbols('.') else 1)
